content.text: Apply bugfix-2: Implemented campaign store isolation, dynamic analytics store scope, and upgraded analytics builder with drag-drop/filter-link metadata.

Implemented campaign store isolation, dynamic analytics store scope, and upgraded analytics builder with drag-drop/filter-link metadata.

Changes applied:
### Campaign store/tenant isolation
- Added store_id to campaigns, coupons, coupon_issuance_events, and coupon_redemption_events models.
- Added Alembic migration 20260328_0009_campaign_store_scope.py with backfill from creator/campaign relationships.
- Scoped campaign list/detail/update/issue/redeem by current user store_id (administrator remains unscoped).
- Made redemption checks and event writes store-aware, including coupon lookup and daily/member counters.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/db/models/campaigns.py, fullstack/backend/alembic/versions/20260328_0009_campaign_store_scope.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/campaign_service.py, fullstack/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/campaigns.py, fullstack/backend/app/schemas/campaigns.py

### Analytics manager scope
- Removed hardcoded [101,102,103] manager scope.
- Now derives manager dashboard scope from current_user.store_id and rejects unassigned managers.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/services/analytics_service.py

### Dashboard builder semantics
- Added visual drag-drop canvas for 12-column positioning of widgets.
- Added widget-level filter bindings and explicit filter-link controls.
- Extended frontend and backend widget schemas/types to persist filters/links in layout metadata.
Files: fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/AnalyticsBuilderView.vue, fullstack/frontend/src/style.css, fullstack/frontend/src/services/analytics.ts, fullstack/backend/app/schemas/analytics.py

Tests added:
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_auth_security.py::test_campaign_store_isolation
